name: Morality & Values Trade-off Lens
summary: A compact way to compare options inside morality & values without pretending there is only one correct answer.
whenToUseIt: Use it when competing priorities need to be weighed explicitly.
steps: Compare the likely upsides and downsides
Choose the least bad path, then review the outcome
example: Use the trade-off lens to compare two different approaches inside morality & values.
